dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9580 IH: Promoting Access and Revenue Integrity Through Institutional Transparency Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Harris of North Carolina introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Education and Workforce

form.official-title: To repeal the 90/10 rule as it pertains to proprietary schools under title IV of the Higher Education Act of 1965.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Promoting Access and Revenue Integrity Through Institutional Transparency Act or the PARITY Act.
Section 487 of the Higher Education Act of 1965 (20 U.S.C. 1094) is amended—

paragraph.text: in subsection (a), by repealing paragraph (24); and
